description_long: This object consists of two aluminum beverage cans, both featuring a red exterior with white script branding reminiscent of Coca-Cola. The cans are cylindrical with a slightly domed top and bottom, and each has a standard pull-tab opening mechanism on the top. The surface of the cans shows signs of wear, including scratches, faded paint, and some areas of discoloration, suggesting they have been used or left outdoors. The branding is partially visible, with the iconic white script running horizontally along the can's body. Both cans are placed on a wooden plank surface, one standing upright and the other lying on its side, providing a clear view of their shape and details. The metallic tops and bottoms are slightly reflective, contrasting with the matte, weathered red body.
description: Two weathered red aluminum beverage cans with white script branding, one upright and one lying on its side, both showing signs of wear and placed on a wooden surface.
description_view_0: Both cans are visible, with one upright and the other lying down, showing the side branding and the metallic tops.
description_view_1: The upright can is centered, and the lying can's pull-tab top is clearly visible, emphasizing the can's opening mechanism.
description_view_2: The lying can's side branding is most prominent, with the upright can in the background, highlighting the cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: The upright can is in the foreground with the lying can partially obscured behind, showing more of the can's back and less branding.
attribute_label_or_branding: White script branding resembling Coca-Cola, partially visible and faded, running horizontally along the red can body.
